message:
test(frame): add comprehensive from_csv_with_options test coverage

Add five new tests exercising the DataFrameCsvReadOptions API:
- index_col + na_values + dtype coercion (Float64) in a single parse
- has_header=false generates numeric column names ("0", "1", ...)
- Invalid dtype parse (non-numeric string to Int64) returns
  FrameError::CompatibilityRejected with column name + type in message
- Unknown column name in dtypes map returns CompatibilityRejected
  with "unknown column" diagnostic
- Import for DataFrameCsvReadOptions added to test module

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
